add.title: Add WeChat account
add.chooseModel: Choose which model this WeChat account routes to:
add.changeLater: You can change the model later by re-scanning.
page.title: WeChat
page.subtitle: Connect your WeChat so direct messages route to your agent.
page.deleteConfirm: Disconnect this WeChat account from tianshu? Existing chat history with this account will be deleted too.
page.empty.title: No WeChat connected
page.empty.desc: Scan a QR with the WeChat app to start routing your direct messages through tianshu.
page.bound.hint: One account connected. Re-scan to switch model or refresh the token.
page.bound.modelTitle: Model this binding routes inbound DMs to
manifest.description: WeChat channel backed by Tencent's iLink bot API. Scan a QR code with the WeChat app to authorise; inbound DMs from authorised users route to the agent through the channel system.
